response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two songs based on on-screen text: 'サマーチョコレート' and '恋するフォーチュンクッキー'.\n2. 'Summer Chocolate' is an original song by Yukihana Lamy and Yozora Mel; official lyrics were not found in the search, so a placeholder is used.\n3. 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie' is a well-known song by AKB48; lyrics were retrieved successfully from multiple reliable sources.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two VTubers, Yukihana Lamy and Yozora Mel, performing a medley on stage. They perform their original song 'Summer Chocolate' followed by a cover of AKB48's 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie'.

scenes.description: Yukihana Lamy and Yozora Mel perform their original song 'Summer Chocolate'. Text 'サマーチョコレート' appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: (Lyrics unavailable due to the song being a private or very recent original track, though it plays clearly in the video.)

scenes.description: The VTubers transition into a cover performance of 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie' by AKB48. The on-screen text identifies the composer and lyricist.
